requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz, Type C / D / G Plug
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — 230V / 50Hz，C / D / G型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — 230V / 50Hz，C / D / G型插頭

summary.en: Sudan operates on 230 V / 50 Hz mains supply. Plug types are mixed: Type C (Europlug, 2-pin round) and Type D (BS 546 3-pin round, Indian standard) are most common; Type G (BS 1363 3-pin rectangular, British standard) is found in some older buildings. Electrical safety must conform to applicable IEC standards as adopted by SSMO. Products rated for 220–240 V / 50 Hz are electrically compatible. Plug type must match or appropriate adapter guidance provided.
summary.zh: 苏丹使用230V/50Hz市电。插头类型混合：最常见为C型（欧式插头，双圆针）和D型（BS 546三圆针，印度标准）；部分旧建筑使用G型（BS 1363三方针，英国标准）。电气安全须符合SSMO采用的适用IEC标准。额定220–240V/50Hz的产品电气兼容。插头类型须匹配或提供适当的适配器说明。
summary.zht: 蘇丹使用230V/50Hz市電。插頭類型混合：最常見為C型（歐式插頭，雙圓針）和D型（BS 546三圓針，印度標準）；部分舊建築使用G型（BS 1363三方針，英國標準）。電氣安全須符合SSMO採用的適用IEC標準。額定220–240V/50Hz的產品電氣相容。插頭類型須匹配或提供適當的適配器說明。

standards_or_laws: Plug types: Type C (most common), Type D (common), Type G (older buildings)
IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 (IT and audio/video equipment safety — adopted as SS standards)
SSMO SS series electrical safety standards (IEC adoption)

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz mains supply with Type I (AS/NZS 3112 variant, 3-flat-pin) and Type A (2-flat-pin) plugs. GB 4943.1 covers IT equipment electrical safety. Products rated 220 V / 50 Hz are voltage-compatible with Sudan but plug type differs — Chinese Type I plugs are not compatible with Sudan Type C, D, or G sockets without adapters.
summary.zh: 中国使用220V/50Hz市电，采用I型（AS/NZS 3112变体，三扁针）和A型（双扁针）插头。GB 4943.1涵盖信息技术设备电气安全。额定220V/50Hz的产品与苏丹电压兼容，但插头类型不同——中国I型插头与苏丹C、D或G型插座不兼容，需使用转接头。
summary.zht: 中國使用220V/50Hz市電，採用I型（AS/NZS 3112變體，三扁針）和A型（雙扁針）插頭。GB 4943.1涵蓋資訊技術裝置電氣安全。額定220V/50Hz的產品與蘇丹電壓相容，但插頭類型不同——中國I型插頭與蘇丹C、D或G型插座不相容，需使用轉接頭。

standards_or_laws: China plug type: Type I (3-flat-pin), Type A (2-flat-pin)
CCC for applicable electrical product categories

gap.en: Voltage (220–230 V / 50 Hz) is electrically compatible. The primary gap is plug type: Chinese Type I and Type A plugs are not compatible with Sudan Type C, D, or G sockets. Devices must be supplied with appropriate Type C or Type D plugs or a universal power supply with detachable plug. Electrical safety test reports should reference IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 as adopted by SSMO; GB 4943.1 reports from ILAC-recognized labs may be acceptable as supporting documentation but NCRTC/SSMO confirmation is advised.
gap.zh: 电压（220–230V/50Hz）电气兼容。主要差距为插头类型：中国I型和A型插头与苏丹C、D或G型插座不兼容。设备须配备适当的C型或D型插头，或配备可拆卸插头的通用电源适配器。电气安全测试报告应参照SSMO采用的IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1；来自ILAC认可实验室的GB 4943.1报告可作为支持文件，但建议向NCRTC/SSMO确认。
gap.zht: 電壓（220–230V/50Hz）電氣相容。主要差距為插頭類型：中國I型和A型插頭與蘇丹C、D或G型插座不相容。裝置須配備適當的C型或D型插頭，或配備可拆卸插頭的通用電源適配器。電氣安全測試報告應參照SSMO採用的IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1；來自ILAC認可實驗室的GB 4943.1報告可作為支持文件，但建議向NCRTC/SSMO確認。

source.publisher: SSMO — Sudanese Standards and Metrology Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sudan mains voltage (230 V / 50 Hz) is compatible with Chinese 220 V–rated devices. Plug type is a practical gap: supply Type C or Type D plugs or a universal adapter. Electrical safety compliance should reference IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 as adopted by SSMO; confirm acceptable test report standards with NCRTC before finalizing the compliance dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 苏丹市电电压（230V/50Hz）与中国额定220V设备兼容。插头类型存在实际差距：须配备C型或D型插头或通用适配器。电气安全合规应参照SSMO采用的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1；在最终确定合规文件前，须向NCRTC确认可接受的测试报告标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蘇丹市電電壓（230V/50Hz）與中國額定220V裝置相容。插頭類型存在實際差距：須配備C型或D型插頭或通用適配器。電氣安全合規應參照SSMO採用的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1；在最終確定合規文件前，須向NCRTC確認可接受的測試報告標準。
